title: B.Braun India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: B.Braun India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
B.Braun India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About B.Braun India:
B.Braun India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with B.Braun India!
